ai_insights.executive_summary: The Marketing Mix Model explains 99.3% of weekly revenue variance across 2 years of data for ShopNova. Current media budget of $175,000/week generates ~$534,821/week in media-attributable revenue (ROAS: 4.4x). Our optimization identifies a 24.4% lift opportunity — approximately $6,793,510 additional annual revenue — by reallocating the same budget based on each channel's marginal return curve.

key_findings.title: Email: Highest ROI channel (12.8x)
key_findings.detail: Generates $12.76 per $1 spent. At 38% saturation, significant scaling headroom remains.

key_findings.title: Paid Search: Highest diminishing returns (44% saturated)
key_findings.detail: Current spend has pushed this channel past the efficient frontier. Marginal dollars here yield less than any other channel.
key_findings.action: Reduce from $45,000 to $38,500/week and reallocate to higher-headroom channels.

key_findings.title: Email: Most underleveraged opportunity
key_findings.detail: At 12.8x ROI and only 38% saturation, Email has the highest marginal return of any channel.
key_findings.action: Scale from $8,000 to $29,138/week. Focus: cart abandonment, lifecycle, winback.

key_findings.title: TV/OTT: 2-week carryover requires longer attribution
key_findings.detail: 35% weekly decay means campaigns impact revenue for 4-6 weeks. Standard 7-day windows undervalue by ~40%.
key_findings.action: Adopt 28-day measurement. Validate with geo-holdout incrementality tests.

key_findings.title: Organic + Direct = 9% of revenue baseline
key_findings.detail: Healthy brand equity provides stability. Paid media drives incremental growth on top of this foundation.
key_findings.action: Maintain SEO investment. Track brand search volume as health indicator.

ai_insights.optimization_narrative: The optimizer equalizes marginal returns across channels while enforcing minimum spend floors for strategic presence. Key moves: Paid Search ↓ $6,500; Paid Social ↓ $7,000; Display ↓ $7,750; Email ↑ $21,138; TV / OTT ↓ $16,500; Affiliate ↑ $16,612. Net: +24.4% media revenue lift at same total spend.
ai_insights.methodology: Log-linear MMM with saturation transforms (1 − e^(−spend/k)), geometric adstock (channel-specific decay & lag), seasonal + trend controls. R² = 0.993. Budget optimization via marginal ROI equalization with per-channel minimum floors. 104 weeks × 6 paid channels.
